insights.title: Exploring Modern Print Effects: Bristal, Glossy & Matte
insights.excerpt: Discover physical textures and visual brilliance with our new print effects, featuring bristal, high gloss, deep matte, 3D high density, metallic foil, and eco soft waterbase finishes.

insights.title: Optimizing High-Concentration Reactive Dyes
insights.excerpt: Technical analysis on achieving deeper shades with 30% less water usage in industrial dyeing processes.

insights.title: Global Supply Chain Resilience in 2026
insights.excerpt: How Sterling Dye Chem is navigating global logistics challenges to ensure timely delivery to 40+ countries.

catalog.description: Premium silicone printing inks for high-stretch athletic wear and difficult-to-print substrates.

subtypes.name: Silicone Printing Inks - Bristal Effect
subtypes.description: Silicone inks are specialized printing inks designed for use on silicone rubber and other difficult-to-print surfaces. They are widely used in industries where flexibility, durability, and resistance to extreme conditions are required. Silicone inks provide strong adhesion to silicone substrates, which is normally challenging because silicone surfaces have low surface energy.

catalog.description: Vibrant oil-based PVC-free ink solutions for eco-friendly modern industrial printing.
Highly specialized textile effect inks featuring metallic shimmers, glow, and color changing properties.
Smooth water-based color pigments for pure, natural textile dyeing and soft hand feel.

catalog.brand: Eco friendly water based textile inks
